title: Audit Rules Catalog Index
description: Index of available audit rules: version and list of rule ids. Individual rules live in rules/*.yaml.

dimensions.description: Supported dimensions (security, performance, accessibility, seo, architecture, best-practices, syntax, aeo, veo)

file.description: Relative path to rule file, e.g. rules/swallowed-exceptions.yaml

rules.description: List of rule ids (and optional file path) in this catalog
